reason: i11 is a methodology-conduct + deterministic-gate + intake-UX fix (the testLenses7codex Squad confirmation-integrity blocker). No feature-architecture component co-design, so co_design is false (the SC-025 co-design-record floor does not apply). ui-ux is selected because FR-040 (intake responsiveness: prep announcement + agenda assignment + per-lens progress) is a genuine UX design point.
